title: Tihihi German DVD Release o
wikitext:
[]: Tihihi. German DVD Release \o/             Quote Post by qu4d » Tue Oct 21, 2008 7:59 am The german steelbook has finally arrived today The Cover Front and Back The Inlay German menus But they look worse then the Japanese imho :/ The german steelbook has Japanese and german dub and german subtitles... but with some errors in it :/ But at least we got a release here already

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Tue Oct 21, 2008 8:24 am that looks nice considering the US STILL doesnt have one I like that artwork though

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Oct 21, 2008 8:58 am Those are some of the sharpest menus I have seen.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Tue Oct 21, 2008 9:57 am Lucky, though it's nice to see a legit release when Taiwan is making bootlegs left and right.

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Tue Oct 21, 2008 10:11 am Shiny... Very shiny indeed. Fucking US holding western distribution up. Theyre milking distributors in yourcountry, and holding the rest of the world up. Mark my words. Either that or to encourage us to pay 100 euro a pop

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Oct 21, 2008 10:17 am Any worthwhile bonus features? Or is it just everything from the Japanese release? I might very well purchase this when Im in Austria over Christmas vacation because I can speak German pretty fluently. And what little i've heard the German dub is 100 times better than the American one. Though however they did Asuka is beyond me.

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Tue Oct 21, 2008 10:24 am Bonus features are kinda exact the same from the Japanese original... Making of with 2 different music styles, Angel of Doom video, 2 Japanese trailers, 1 german trailer. And the german dub is not bad... just Rei and Misato were replaced and Misato is kinda annoying... at least at the beginning.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Oct 21, 2008 12:02 pm Very nice! I'm probably still going to hold out for the inevitable Rebuild 4 pack that Gainax would milk and re-release for all it's worth, but the German Steelbook looks very nice.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Tue Oct 21, 2008 5:28 pm this is very interesting: what German company made the regional release? what is the official German dub cast this time? (is there an official German dub website?)

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Oct 21, 2008 5:49 pm The case and DVD cover look fantastic. I like the Japanese menu more than the German one, but it's still pretty nice. Here's hoping the American version will be at least a significant fraction as good.

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Wed Oct 22, 2008 1:32 am V wrote: this is very interesting: what German company made the regional release? what is the official German dub cast this time? (is there an official German dub website?)

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Oct 22, 2008 12:24 pm interesting: does your box set have a listing of the German dub voice cast?

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Wed Oct 22, 2008 12:30 pm http://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Evangelion:1.0_%E2%80%93_You_are_(not)_alone.#Synchronisation ;> edit: here http://tinyurl.com/5b9lvw

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Oct 22, 2008 3:23 pm ...they call regional-adaptation "synchronization"? :)

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Thu Oct 23, 2008 2:26 am yes... because that´s what they do. synchronize

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Fri Oct 24, 2008 3:20 pm Ok, I couldn't wait, I ordered mine online. Gonna have to get used to german subs
summary:
[]: Tihihi. German DVD Release \o/             Quote Post by qu4d » Tue Oct 21, 2008 7:59 am The german steelbook has finally arrived today The Cover Front and Back The Inlay German menus But they look worse then the Japanese imho :/ The german steelbook has Japanese and german dub and german subtitles... but with some errors in it :/ But at least we got a release here already
